article.title: Exploring the therapeutic synergy of drug-lifestyle interventions in fluorosis: a randomized trial on cardiovascular metabolic outcomes from the China fluorosis cohort (CFC).
article.authors: Lu Y, Tao F, Wei S
article.abstract: Skeletal fluorosis patients face a markedly elevated risk of cardiovascular metabolic abnormalities, including endothelial dysfunction, excessive oxidative stress, and impaired calcium-phosphate metabolism. Current clinical interventions for this condition are limited to symptomatic analgesia and conventional anti-osteoporotic treatments, and lack targeted therapeutic strategies for the "kidney deficiency and blood stasis" pathogenesis of skeletal fluorosis that can synergistically protect both the skeletal and cardiovascular systems.
